report_format.name: Suricatoos Premium PDF (EN)
report_format.summary: Premium branded PDF vulnerability report (English). Version 20260701.
report_format.description: A premium, corporate vulnerability assessment report in PDF (English): branded cover, executive risk summary with a severity dashboard, a hosts and open-ports inventory, a findings summary table, and detailed findings grouped by vulnerability (CVSS, CVEs, affected systems, remediation). Version 20260701.
